---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: false
---

[Download CV (PDF)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fboehm/cv/master/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

```{=html}
<iframe
  src="https://docs.google.com/viewer?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fboehm/cv/master/cv.pdf&embedded=true"
  width="100%"
  height="900px"
  style="border: none; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <p>Your browser does not support embedded PDFs.
     <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fboehm/cv/master/cv.pdf" target="_blank">Download the CV here.</a>
  </p>
</iframe>
```
